definition:
1. stitched, patched , (Odyssey by Homer) 
2. metaphorically strung together, continuous , of verses, (Pindar) 
3. worked with the needle : ῥαπτόν, οῦ, an embroidered carpet , (Xenophon Historicus); ῥαπτὴ σφαῖρα a stitched  ball, of divers colours, [variant datesAnthology Palantina 
 (ML)
